rsi_length.rationale: RSI 14 is the crypto industry standard. Changing breaks signal compatibility.

bollinger_std_dev.rationale: Bollinger Bands 2-sigma captures ~95% of price action.

bollinger_length.rationale: 20-period is the standard SMA for Bollinger Bands.

atr_length.rationale: ATR 14 is the Wilder standard period.

momentum_periods.rationale: Kang weighted momentum uses these crypto-tuned periods.

momentum_weights.rationale: Kang weighting scheme emphasizes short-term momentum.
